title: neuracanthus tetragonostachyus subsp. tetragonostachyus
intro: Neuracanthus tetragonostachyus subsp. tetragonostachyus, commonly known as the "Tetragonostachys", is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neuracanthus tetragonostachyus subsp. tetragonostachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are used to treat a range of health conditions.
